about_quotes.speaker: Steve Buckingham,
about_quotes.evidence: Al Jackson on drums, black; Steve Cropper, white, on guitar, and Duck Dunn, white, on bass. But that was as black as a — I mean that was really deep funk soul music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Buckingham, interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 25, 2019 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: Al Jackson or Roger Hawkins... pick out a hero, pick out somebody you really want to emulate... Whether it’s Bernard Purdie or Al Jackson or Roger Hawkins
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Joey Morant
about_quotes.evidence: The guy who manages Jackson — Al Jackson — he and the late Jack the Rapper of Atlanta, Georgia.
